name: Merino Wool Beanie
description: 100% superfine merino wool beanie in a classic ribbed style. Naturally warm, breathable, and itch-free.

specifications.value: Charcoal, Navy, Forest Green, Wine Red, Oatmeal
Hand Wash Cold or Dry Clean

additionalInfo.value: AlpineKnit Wool Co., Christchurch, New Zealand 8013
One size, stretches to 58 cm head circumference

reviews.title: Unbelievably soft merino beanie
reviews.reviewText: This is genuinely one of the softest hats I have ever worn. No itchiness whatsoever and it keeps my head warm on cold mornings without overheating. The quality is outstanding.

reviews.title: Perfect winter essential
reviews.reviewText: Lightweight yet very warm. Merino regulates temperature well so it works in a range of conditions. The ribbed style looks clean and classic. I have bought two, charcoal and navy.

reviews.title: Great quality merino wool
reviews.reviewText: Very soft and comfortable. Fits well and the fold-up brim is nice. The only watch-out is hand washing only for long-term care but the quality makes it very worthwhile.
